Only the top 4 picks are drawn from the lottery. This means that lottery teams can only pick in the following spots: 1. Picks 1 through 4 2. Your original lottery slot 3. The 4 picks below your original lottery slot The teams at the very bottom of the lottery have fewer potential picks slots because there are no/fewer teams that can jump the order by winning one of the top 4 picks.
